nodes.name: 利馬大區
nodes.summary: 利馬大區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Tumbesian tyrannulet、Baird's flycatcher、Piura chat-tyrant等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Fasciated wren
nodes.summary: Fasciated wren（Fasciated wren，学名 Campylorhynchus fasciatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: William Swainson

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.evidence: The nominate fasciated wren is found in coastal Peru from the Department of Piura south to the Department of Lima and also inland Peru from the departments of Cajamarca and Amazonas south to the Department of Huánuco

links.evidence: pallescens is found from southwestern and southern Ecuador into Peru's departments of Tumbes and Piura. The fasciated wren primarily inhabits arid and semi-arid landscapes such as thorny scrublands
